entity.summary: Institutional-oriented centralized cryptocurrency exchange and liquidity venue from the B2Broker group. It launched in January 2018, later ceased maintaining an active public trading website, and its Estonian virtual-asset-service license ended on January 31, 2025 after being renounced during supervision.
entity.notes: HEI uses a month-level 2018-01-01 launch marker because authoritative and database sources identify January 2018 but do not preserve an exact launch day. The exchange is classified inactive rather than dead because the license ending and website outage establish loss of normal operation, but no definitive first-party shutdown notice was recovered.

events.title: B2BX Exchange launched
events.description: B2BX entered operation as an institutional cryptocurrency exchange and liquidity venue for individual and corporate clients.
events.notes: The date is normalized to the beginning of the independently documented January 2018 launch month.

events.title: B2BX Estonian virtual-asset license ended
events.description: B2BX Digital Exchange OÜ's Estonian virtual-asset-service license ended after the company renounced it during a supervisory proceeding.
events.notes: The regulator states that the license had been valid from November 8, 2018 through January 31, 2025.

evidence.title: B2BX exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile records a January 2018 launch and the institutional exchange identity.

evidence.title: B2BROKER Gears Up For Blockchain Forum Deconomy 2018
evidence.notes: First-party B2Broker material identifies B2BX.exchange as its exchange and cryptocurrency-liquidity aggregator in active operation during 2018.

evidence.title: B2BX Digital Exchange OÜ renounced their license of virtual asset services during supervision proceeding
evidence.notes: Official regulator notice states that the virtual-asset-service license was valid until January 31, 2025 and was renounced during supervision.

evidence.title: B2BX website status
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile reports the B2BX website offline since October 17, 2024.

evidence.title: B2BX Digital Exchange OÜ company record
evidence.notes: Company-registry profile corroborates the Estonian B2BX Digital Exchange OÜ identity.
